system.name: doorbell
system.note: check battery before the shorter days

task.description: Clear gutters and downspouts after the maples drop.
task.followUp: Second pass early November once the rest of the leaves are down.

task.description: Blow out and store the garden hoses; shut the exterior taps.
Service the snow blower and top up fuel stabiliser.
Final mow, aerate the back lawn, rake the leaf piles by the fence line.
Cover and clean the grill grates; the grill stays in use year-round, so keep the cover handy.
Replace the furnace filter and book the annual furnace service.

cost.note: filter on hand, under the confirmation line

task.description: Reverse the ceiling fans for winter circulation.
Test smoke and CO detectors; fit fresh batteries.
Load the winter heating schedule; check the doorbell battery and the light timers.
Tidy the garage bench so the winter woodworking shelf build actually starts.

item.description: Mid-winter check on the snow blower and a salt restock.
Glue up and mount the vinyl shelf; load the records.

rules.rule: No single job crosses the $350 confirmation line without a heads-up to Nicole.
Workshop and outdoor jobs run on non-shift days only, with the bench tidy first.
If the back flares, the PT routine takes priority over any lifting task that week.
